title: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. Announces Webcast of Presentation at the Virtual 5th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference
text: Columbus, OH, Nov. 16, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE:MTD) today announced the webcast of its presentation at the virtual 5th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference on Wednesday, November 30, 2022, at 11:20 a.m. Eastern Time.  To hear a live webcast of the presentation, visit the investor relations page on the Company's Web site at www.mt.com/investors .  A replay of the webcast will be available for seven days.  METTLER TOLEDO (NYSE: MTD) is a leading global supplier of precision instruments and services. We have strong leadership positions in all of our businesses and believe we hold global number-one market positions in most of them. We are recognized as an innovation leader and our solutions are critical in key R&D, quality control, and manufacturing processes for customers in a wide range of industries including life sciences, food, and chemicals. Our sales and service network is one of the most extensive in the industry. Our products are sold in more than 140 countries and we have a direct presence in approximately 40 countries. With proven growth strategies and a focus on execution, we have achieved a long-term track record of strong financial performance. For more information, please visit www.mt.com.

title: Mettler-Toledo: Long-Term Value Remains, Retain Buy Rating
text: Mettler-Toledo continues to present robust fundamental data to potentially unlock long-term shareholder value. Investors can receive a 7% implied forward buyback yield with management's $2.5Bn in authorized buybacks from FY23.

title: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (MTD) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE:MTD ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 3, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Adam Uhlman - Investor Relations Patrick Kaltenbach - Chief Executive Officer Shawn Vadala - Chief Financial Officer Mary Finnegan - Investor Relations Conference Call Participants Josh Waldman - Cleveland Research Jordan Adler - Evercore ISI Tim Daley - Wells Fargo Alonso Garcia - UBS Matt Sykes - Goldman Sachs Operator Good afternoon. My name is Audra, and I will be your conference operator today.

title: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) Q3 Earnings & Sales Beat, Increase Y/Y
text: Mettler-Toledo's (MTD) third-quarter 2022 results benefit from robust Laboratory and Industrial segments, and solid momentum across the Americas and Asia.

title: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.56% and 1.12%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in the Offing for Mettler-Toledo's (MTD) Q3 Earnings?
text: Mettler-Toledo's (MTD) third-quarter results are likely to reflect benefits of strong momentum across the laboratory, food retail and industrial businesses.
